notes:
Copy to ~/.config/prompt-improver/settings.json or .prompt-improver/settings.json.
Set model / default_models for built-in backends.
Per-prompt: /prompt-improver model:sonnet "…".
For any other CLI (Kilo, wrappers, …): set custom_command (prompt on stdin, improved text on stdout). See docs/CUSTOM-BACKENDS.md.
